source.title: Can I Cancel a Rental Early?
source.author: ATMTA / Star Atlas official publisher

summary.archival_abstract: Official support article titled “Can I Cancel a Rental Early?.” This record preserves what Star Atlas Support / ATMTA publicly stated at the recorded publication time; claims about delivery, economics, or outcomes remain limited to the wording of the source.
summary.historical_value: Official evidence baseline for later reconciliation with community reporting.
summary.current_validity_warning: Official publication does not independently prove successful execution, completeness, or continued current validity.

article_text:
Yes, renters can cancel their fleet rental at any time. When you cancel:
The system calculates a pro-rata refund for any unused rental days.
Payments are released daily, with refunds processed on the next scheduled tick (0000 UTC).
The rental status will update accordingly, and you will receive a confirmation once the cancellation is complete.
Example Timeline: If accepting a rental at 1000 UTC for a duration of 5 days
